channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - techraptor.net
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Wizkids Announces Official Dungeons & Dragons Ravenloft: The Horrors Within Miniatures Line
item.content:encoded:
Wizkids have announced an official Dungeons & Dragons Ravenloft: The Horrors Within miniatures line. The line of miniatures, a part of their Icons of the Realms series, will feature detailed, painted depictions of the supplements dark lords and cosmic horrors.

In an official press release, Wizkids announced three products as part of their Dungeons & Dragons Ravenloft: The Horrors Within miniatures. All three of these products will be available on October 2026, during the appropriately spooky time of Halloween.

The first product, D&D Icons of the Realms: Eldritch Enemies of Ravenloft, features three new aberration monsters from the book. Said creatures are sold table ready, and depict creatures of either Medium or Huge size. Each box includes three miniatures: A Mi-Go, an Elder Thing, and a Shoggoth. It will be sold at an MSRP of $49.99.

The second product of the Dungeons & Dragons Ravenloft: The Horrors Within is known as Maddening Monsters of Ravenloft. This set includes new or returning monsters to the Ravenloft setting and 5.5e. This includes the time-traveling alien Yithian, Nightgaunts, the winged servants of the Lord of the Great Abyss, and the twisted wolflike Gug. It will be sold at an MSRP of $49.99.

Last but not least is the Cthulhu Boxed miniature. Yes, the iconic monster of the Lovecraft mythos is now, as of Ravenloft: The Horrors Within, a Dark Lord in Dungeons & Dragons 5.5e. Fittingly, it has a Gargantuan 100mm model base and iridescent paint and gloss to make it appropriately "wet" looking. This miniature will be sold at an MSRP of $79.99.

Ravenloft: The Horrors Within is the latest supplement for Dungeons & Dragons 5.5e as part of its new seasonal model. The book focuses on the Ravenloft setting, a demiplane of mist-covered ironic prisons overseen by Dark Lords. These Dark Lords include the iconic vampire wizard warlord Strahd Von Zarovich, The Wizard King Azalin Rex, and even The Whispered One, Vecna. 

The book is set to release June 16, 2026.

Ever since he was small, Tyler Chancey has had a deep, abiding love for video games and a tendency to think and overanalyze everything he enjoyed. This… More about Tyler
